attributes.action: Provide urgent financial relief for uk residents facing rising fuel/living costs
attributes.additional_details: High fuel prices due to global conflict, stagnant wages, and record-high taxes are making life unsustainable for families in UK . We request an emergency "Inflation Allowance" for workers earning under £50,000 and a subsidy to stop the planned July 2026 energy price cap
attributes.background: We call on the Government to immediately reduce Fuel Duty by 20p, freeze energy prices at 2024 levels, and increase the Personal Tax Allowance to help workers whose pay has not kept up with inflation.

rejection.details:
We need a petition to focus on one or two actions it wants Government to undertake - you have a number of actions all of which can be found in other petitions.  We are not clear how your request differs from any of these.  You may wish to sign some of them:

On fuel duty:
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions?state=open&q=fuel+duty

On income tax thresholds:
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions?q=income+tax&state=open

On oil and gas prices:
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/764109
